recording_notes: DIRECT CAMERA RECORDING — same blue FLS trainer as V30. Camera inside trainer looking directly at task. Blue box, red clamps, duct tape, pink/red foam. Dark suture. Standard scissors visible on table above trainer. 1280x720 at 30fps. Excellent detail — highest confidence tier.

frame_analyses.description: Direct camera inside blue FLS trainer. Drain visible with Penrose. One instrument from lower left with dark suture. Scissors on table above. TIMING STARTS ~3s.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Same excellent direct camera setup as V30.

frame_analyses.description: Both instruments at drain. Suture placed — dark suture extending from drain. Instruments working on first throw wrapping.
Second throw in progress. Both instruments at drain. Suture wrapping visible. Knot building at drain center.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: First throw complete ~48s (~25s). Second throw wrapping.

frame_analyses.description: Third throw tightening. Both instruments spread laterally — classic lateral pull. Dark suture crossing at drain. Drain compressing under knot tension.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Second throw complete ~65s (~17s). Third throw tightening at 90s (~25s).

frame_analyses.description: Cutting phase. Both instruments at drain — scissors visible at right with open jaws. Suture tails extending from knot. Active cutting.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Third throw complete ~93s. Cutting started ~93s. 27s into cutting.

frame_analyses.description: Task complete. Instruments withdrawn. Compact knot at drain center with very short dark tails. Drain slit appears WELL CLOSED — edges tightly approximated. No gap visible. Drain not avulsed. Clean result.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Completion ~140s. Total from first instrument: ~137s. IMPROVEMENT from V30 (158s).

knot_assessments.notes: First throw 23-48s (25s). Surgeon's knot. Improved from V30's 30s. Confidence: HIGH.
Second throw 48-65s (17s). Single throw. Efficient. Confidence: HIGH.
Third throw 65-93s (28s). Longest throw — visible lateral tightening at 90s. Good technique but slower. Confidence: HIGH.

suture_placement.placement_notes: Direct camera provides good view. Placement appears accurate. Marks partially visible.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Direct camera at 143s shows drain well-closed with compact knot. Very short tails — excellent cutting quality. No gap. Drain not avulsed. Second consecutive high-confidence drain assessment.

technique_summary: V31 at approximately 137 seconds represents a 13% improvement from V30 (158s) on the same blue FLS trainer with direct camera. This is the second attempt on this equipment and the trainee is clearly adapting rapidly — already within the familiar-equipment plateau range (140-155s on the RCA station). Placement improved from 25s to 18s, and cutting improved from 70s to 47s — a 33% reduction. Throws at 70s total are slightly slower than V30's 62s due to a longer third throw (28s), but within normal range. The direct camera continues to provide excellent confidence (0.62). The blue trainer adaptation curve (158→137) is dramatically faster than the Vizio station (365→295), confirming the V28-V29 issue was equipment-specific. At this rate, the trainee could reach sub-120s on this equipment within 2-3 more attempts.
improvement_suggestions: V30→V31: 158s→137s = 21s improvement (13%). Rapid adaptation to blue trainer confirmed.
Cutting improved 70s→47s (33%) — the fastest cutting improvement between consecutive attempts on any equipment.
Third throw at 28s is the longest phase — investigate if there's a tightening technique issue.
DIRECT CAMERA remains excellent — continue using this setup for all recordings.
At current adaptation rate, sub-120s on this equipment is achievable within 2-3 more attempts.
Placement at 18s — now matching RCA station performance. Equipment familiarization complete for this phase.
Next target: bring cutting below 35s consistently to reach the 110-120s range.
strengths: 13% improvement from V30 (158→137) — rapid equipment adaptation
Cutting improved 33% (70→47s) — biggest single-attempt cutting improvement
HIGH CONFIDENCE (0.62) — direct camera, second consecutive
CONFIRMED well-closed drain, very short tails, no gap
Placement at 18s — matching RCA station best
Already within RCA-station plateau range on second attempt at blue trainer
20% improvement from baseline (198→137) on unfamiliar equipment

phase_comparison.placement_18s: Improved from V30's 25s. Now matching RCA-station best.
phase_comparison.throws_70s: Slightly slower than V30's 62s. Third throw (28s) was the culprit.

key_observations: 137s / 458 FLS — second attempt on blue trainer, 13% faster than V30.
Blue trainer adaptation: 158→137. Faster than Vizio adaptation (365→295).
Cutting 47s — best on this equipment, approaching RCA-station range (26-67s).
Already within RCA-station plateau (140-155s) on second attempt.
Direct camera confidence 0.62 — two consecutive high-confidence assessments.
31st video. Three equipment curves: RCA peaked at 94s, Vizio at 295s, blue trainer at 137s and improving.
Projected next attempt: ~120s. Sub-100s on blue trainer may be achievable within 5-6 total attempts.
